steps.title: Identify the passage's structural arc
steps.content: The passage progresses from introducing San Francisco's murals broadly to focusing on Balmy Alley specifically, providing its 1970s origin, describing its ongoing evolution, and concluding with a statement of its contemporary significance as a “living showcase” of the city's cultural changes. This arc—from context through history to present importance—defines the purpose.

steps.title: Match this arc to the choices
steps.content: Choice B matches this arc: the passage presents Balmy Alley's history (1970s origin) and importance (its role as a cultural showcase). The other choices misidentify the scope—A and C introduce unsupported elements (comparison to other murals, advocacy for protection), while D narrows to the 1970s origin alone. That matches choice B — B is correct.
